steps.title: Identify the two components of the relationship
steps.content:
Twice the value of $x$ means $2x$.
8 more than a quantity means add 8 to that quantity.

steps.title: Combine to form the equation for $y$
steps.content:
Taking twice the value of $x$ (which is $2x$) and adding 8 yields:
$$y = 2x + 8$$
This matches choice B — B is correct.
